workflow_name: Customer Payment - Apply Payment to Order

steps.description: Type the Customer Payments menu option at the LEGADEMO main menu command prompt
Press Enter to navigate to the Customer Payments screen
Type the customer number in the Customer Number field
Press Enter to look up the customer and display customer details
Type the order number to apply the payment against in the Order Number field
Press Enter to look up the order and display order payment details
Type the payment amount in the Paid Amount field
Press Enter to submit the payment and display the confirmation popup
Press Enter to confirm and finalize the payment
Press F3 to exit Customer Payments and return to the LEGADEMO main menu
